verifyEmail.subject: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.title: Confirm your registration to Minecraft-Stats.fr
verifyEmail.intro: There is only one step left to register with our services, you must confirm your email address by pressing the button below. In case you are not the originator of this account creation on Minecraft-Stats.fr, you can simply do nothing.
verifyEmail.viewInBrowser: View this email in your browser
verifyEmail.footerReason: You are receiving this email advertisement because you registered with Minecraft-Stats.fr.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your password
resetPassword.title: Reset your Minecraft-Stats.fr password
resetPassword.intro: We received a request to reset the password for your account. Click the button below to choose a new password.
resetPassword.expiry: This link will expire in 1 hour for your security.
resetPassword.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email — your password won't change.
resetPassword.viewInBrowser: View this email in your browser
resetPassword.footerReason: You are receiving this email because a password reset was requested for your Minecraft-Stats.fr account.
